blended.narrative: Schweitzer is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,750 ft. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Saturday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: light rain showers, highs of 42°F.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 7" over the past week. Current depth: 62".
